case_title: PATEL, DAVID vs. JODEH, TONY DBA TEEL'S COFFEESHOP & DELI et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT JODEH, TONY DBA TEEL'S COFFEESHOP & DELI DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED

#3 CHAITIN--REPTR SAUCEDA--CC FOR COURT TRIAL. ALL PRESENT. AFTER DISCUSSIONS WITH COUNSEL, ALL AGREE A CONTINUANCE IS IN ORDER SO ACCOUNTING OF RENT OWING CAN BE DONE. ACCTG RECORDS ARE TO BE PROVIDED TO PLTF ATTY BY 5PM 6-16-93. IT IS ALSO AGREED THAT DEFT SHALL PAY PLTF $1000 BY CASHIERS CHECK BY 2PM ON JUNE 10, 1993 AND DEF IS TO PROVIDE EVIDENCE THAT HE PAID FOR PERIOD IN QUESTION, 1991 THRU 1993 FOR EACH AND EVERY MONTH. WITH PERMISSION OF PJ, COURT TRIAL IS CONTINUED TO 9AM IN DEPT ONE ON JUNE 23, 1993 AND BOTH SIDES WAIVE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, DAVID SERVED MAY-10-1993, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JODEH, TONY DBA TEEL'S COFFEESHOP & DELI
ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT JODEH, TONY DBA TEEL'S COFFEESHOP & DELI

C/C FOR CT TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT W/COUNSEL. CASE SETTLED BY STIP W/JUDGMENT FOR PL FOR REST. OF PREMISES AT 240 7TH ST. AND A MONEY JUDGMENT OF $4,800 TO BE PD IN MONTHLY INSTALLMENTS OF $700 A MO. STARTING 7-1-93. EACH SIDE BEARS THEIR ATTY. FEES & COSTS. UPON DEFAULT OF PMT. JUDGMENT SHALL ENTER FOR THE BALANCE OWING.
